ddls:
CREATE TABLE "races" (
  "race_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race */,
  "race_name" TEXT /* Name of the race */,
  "race_date" TEXT /* Date the race was held */,
  "race_type" TEXT /* Type of the race (e.g., flat, steeplechase) */,
  "track" TEXT /* Track where the race was held */,
  "total_prize_money" REAL /* Total prize money for the race */,
  "race_status" TEXT /* Status of the race (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed, canceled) */,
  "race_distance" TEXT /* Distance of the race */,
  "race_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions of the race (e.g., weather, track condition) */,
  "race_version" INTEGER /* Version of the race results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the race entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "race_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each race result */,
  "race_id" INTEGER /* ID of the race */,
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the horse */,
  "result_position" INTEGER /* Position of the horse in the race */,
  "starting_price" TEXT /* Starting price of the horse */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the horse */,
  "handicap" TEXT /* Handicap of the horse */,
  "prize_money" REAL /* Prize money won by the horse */,
  "time" TEXT /* Finishing time of the horse */,
  "odds" TEXT /* Betting odds of the horse */,
  "form" TEXT /* Recent form of the horse */,
  "jockey_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the jockey */,
  "horse_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the horse */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the result entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_horse_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_id") REFERENCES horses ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_race_results_race_id FOREIGN KEY ("race_id") REFERENCES races ("race_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "horses" (
  "horse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each horse */,
  "horse_name" TEXT /* Name of the horse */,
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the jockey */,
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trainer */,
  "horse_breed" TEXT /* Breed of the horse */,
  "horse_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the horse */,
  "horse_color" TEXT /* Color of the horse */,
  "horse_owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the horse entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the horse entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("horse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_horse_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("horse_owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_jockey_id FOREIGN KEY ("jockey_id") REFERENCES jockeys ("jockey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_horses_trainer_id FOREIGN KEY ("trainer_id") REFERENCES trainers ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "jockeys" (
  "jockey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each jockey */,
  "jockey_name" TEXT /* Full name of the jockey */,
  "jockey_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the jockey */,
  "jockey_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the jockey */,
  "jockey_weight" TEXT /* Weight of the jockey */,
  "jockey_height" TEXT /* Height of the jockey */,
  "jockey_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the jockey */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the jockey entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the jockey entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("jockey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trainers" (
  "trainer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trainer */,
  "trainer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the trainer */,
  "trainer_location" TEXT /* Location of the trainer */,
  "trainer_date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the trainer */,
  "trainer_experience" INTEGER /* Years of experience of the trainer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainer entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the trainer entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trainer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "owner_name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "owner_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the owner */,
  "owner_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the owner */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the owner entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "user_role_id" INTEGER /* ID linking to the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_user_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)
